/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/link.d -shared  -o procengine_cpp.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/seed_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/terrain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/props.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/materials.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/game_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/procengine_cpp.dir/graphics.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libshaderc.so libimgui_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so
